messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi there! I was hoping you could help me with an order I placed for my daughter. She hasn’t received it yet, and I’m a bit worried. Could you help me check where it was sent, if it’s still on the way, and maybe give me the tracking number? Also, I wanted to ask about the tablet I ordered—can you tell me what storage it has? And one more thing: I’d like to make my daughter’s address my default for future orders, so I don’t have to keep changing it.
